categories.name: Vary parameter, measure effect

categories.description: Removing specific components and measuring the impact on the remaining system or other components

categories.name: Classify by type, measure rates or compare
categories.description: Applying a classification scheme to entities and measuring frequencies, rates, or comparing outcomes

categories.name: Generate worlds/universes, then detect or order
categories.description: Generating or evolving multiple instances and applying detectors or measuring what emerges

categories.name: Test predictive or compositional relationships
categories.description: Testing whether one measurement predicts another, or whether elements compose or interact as expected

categories.name: Build structure from data, then analyze
categories.description: Constructing a representation from data and applying analysis or detection methods to it
